opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up choking on acid, and my chest is burning so intensely I thought I was having a heart attack.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly about two hours ago after I went to bed following a big late dinner — it woke me up and I'm too scared to lie back down.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on sharply about 2 hours ago, a little while after I went to bed following a large, late, fatty meal
symptom_narrative.duration: about 2 hours and it hasn't fully settled
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning behind the breastbone that spreads up into my neck, with sour acid coming up into my mouth and a lot of watery saliva
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — it frightened me enough that I thought I was having a heart attack
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: behind the breastbone, going up into the neck and throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when I lie flat; it eased a bit when I got up and started pacing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or standing upright, and a dose of liquid antacid took the edge off for a little while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down flat makes it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sour taste and lots of saliva; I get a nagging dry cough at night and my voice is often hoarse in the mornings, and sometimes it feels like there's a lump in my throat
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bouts of chest discomfort like this on and off before, usually after big meals, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't settle or lie down; I'm pacing the room because I'm frightened

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: occasional bouts of chest discomfort after meals in the past, put down to indigestion

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medicines; I took one dose of a liquid antacid about 30 minutes ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious tonight because I'm frightened this is my heart

objective_data_offered.value: I'm not sweating and I don't look pale; I'm breathing okay but I keep clearing my throat
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description over chat, not a clinician observation

objective_data_offered.value: the burning isn't brought on by walking or effort, and it doesn't spread into my arm or jaw
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported symptom character; does not exclude a cardiac cause
